panels.title: Title Card

overcast sky, desaturated colors, establishing shot, wide angle, moody atmosphere,

panels.title: Bracket Shock

shocked quiet expression, taekwondo uniform with school patch, crowded gymnasium background,
close-up on face and bracket, STYLE: PREMIER

panels.dialogue: MV: "Kwon's isn't a business. It's a team. If you work, I work."
panels.prompt:
taekwondo master addressing group of six diverse teen students on dojang mats,
team assembly wide shot, mentor speech moment, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Ethan Looks Around
panels.scene: Ethan's POV — faces of new family. Headphones in pocket.
panels.prompt:
POV looking at group of teammates smiling talking on taekwondo mats,
warm golden dojang light, emotional found family moment, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Final Wide
panels.scene: Epic wide — all seven on mat, MV center-back. Golden hour through windows. Team formation.
panels.prompt:
epic wide shot seven taekwondo fighters and master on dojang mats team formation,
golden hour light through windows, found family anime poster composition,
emotional finale, caption space at bottom, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Team Stretch Circle
panels.scene: MV leads stretch circle — seven students — Ethan not in corner — in ring.
panels.prompt:
taekwondo team stretch circle seven students master leading ethan included in ring,
team chemistry haikyuu warmth, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: TJ Windows Line
panels.scene: TJ grins at Ethan — callback Ch 2.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "You picked a place with windows. Good call."
panels.prompt:
confident teen teal headband grinning at ethan team banter dojang,
character voice panel HAIKYUU warmth, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Kieryn Mat Test
panels.scene: Kieryn presses mat with foot — dramatic — actually fine.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "If the mats are soft, I'm still leaving."
panels.prompt:
sarcastic teen girl testing dojang mat with foot dramatic expression,
comic team intro, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Logan Food Question
panels.scene: Logan — bowl cut — backpack overflowing — raises hand like school.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Is there food later? Important question."
panels.prompt:
cheerful small teen bowl cut raising hand asking about food oversized backpack,
comic relief character intro, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Kian Rematch
panels.scene: Kian — silver hair — hands in pockets — locks eyes with Ethan.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "You owe me a rematch from Premier."
panels.prompt:
silver hair teen challenging smirk hands in pockets facing ethan rivalry spark,
character intro tension friendly, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Ariana Silent Stretch
panels.scene: Ariana — red streak bob — stretching alone — doesn't look up — bandages on ankle.
panels.prompt:
quiet teen girl red hair streak stretching alone extra ankle bandages not looking up,
introverted character intro, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: MV Team Speech
panels.scene: MV center — team semicircle — Ethan off-center not hiding.
panels.dialogue: MV: "We train hard. We don't tear each other down. You brought family — don't waste it."
panels.prompt:
master addressing semicircle team speech ethan visible among peers not spotlight,
mentor team speech wide, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: Curiosity Not Pity
panels.scene: Team glances at Ethan — curiosity — TJ nudges Kieryn — no pity faces.
panels.prompt:
team glancing at ethan curious not pitying whispered comment,
group reaction panel, STYLE: KWONS

panels.title: First Group Bow
panels.scene: MV calls bow — seven sync — Ethan one beat late — laughs quietly with Logan.
panels.prompt:
seven students bowing together ethan slightly late logan stifling laugh team sync,
found family chemistry, STYLE: KWONS HAIKYUU

panels.title: Caption Card
panels.scene: Black hold — white text — same energy as 1.1 title card inverted.
